---
title: "The Rev. Robert Henry Codrington"
---

## The Rev. Robert Henry Codrington

**Dates:** (1830-1922)

### Description

head of the Melanesian mission 1871-7

### Biography

He succeeded the Rt. Rev. John Coleridge Patteson as head of the mission to Melanesia;  he was author of a <i>Mota Dictionary</i> and ethnographical works on Melanesia.

### Letters

- Letter from April 9th 1885[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from 14 May 1872
- Letter from March 23d 1872
- Letter from February 16th, 1871.
- Letter from November 24, 1869.
- Letter from December 21, 1868.
- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.
- Letter from January 29, 1867.
- Letter from [‘Southern Cross’ between Auckland and Norfolk Island, May 1864]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
